title: Dentsply Sirona Expands U.S. Distribution Footprint Through Enhanced Agreement with Atlanta Dental Supply
author: Na
description: Dentsply Sirona announced an enhanced distribution agreement with Atlanta Dental Supply, effective August 1, 2026, to expand access to its digital dentistry technologies including CEREC systems, intraoral scanning, and digital imaging solutions across the Southeast. The partnership strengthens Dentsply Sirona's U.S. go-to-market strategy through a well-established regional distributor with deep customer relationships.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is strategically expanding its U.S. distribution network through a partnership with an established regional distributor, which strengthens its commercial reach and market penetration for digital dentistry solutions. This represents disciplined growth and customer-centric expansion.

title: $13+ Bn Dental Laboratories Market - Global Forecast to 2030 Featuring Dentsply Sirona, Envista, Ivoclar Vivadent AG, and Planmeca Oy
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global dental laboratories market is projected to grow from USD 9.20 billion in 2025 to USD 13.09 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 7.3%. Growth is driven by rising dental disorders, aging populations, and technological advancements including digital workflows, CAD/CAM systems, and 3D printing. North America leads the market, with CAD/CAM materials dominating the product segment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a leading player in the growing dental laboratories market with strong market position and expected to benefit from 7.3% CAGR growth through 2030.
Identified as a key market player positioned to capitalize on the expanding dental laboratories market and increasing adoption of advanced technologies.

title: Global Shift to Clear Aligners to Build a USD 99.44 Billion Market by 2034
author: Towards Healthcare
description: The global clear aligners market is valued at $11.23 billion in 2026 and is expected to grow to $99.44 billion by 2034, expanding at a 31.34% CAGR. North America leads the market while Asia Pacific shows the fastest growth. Adults dominate by age segment, polyurethane leads by material type, and online distribution channels are expected to grow fastest. Key drivers include rising demand for aesthetic orthodontic solutions, technological advancements in 3D imaging and AI, and expanding access through digital platforms.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Align Technology (Invisalign) is highlighted as a leading market player driving innovation and service integration. The company held the 2025 Invisalign GP Summit with over 700 participants, demonstrating strong market presence and continued investment in digital tools and treatment workflows.
Listed among key players in the clear aligners market, positioned to benefit from the 31.34% CAGR growth driven by technological advancements in digital dentistry and 3D scanning solutions.
Included as a key player in the market, well-positioned to capitalize on expanding dental clinic networks and growing adoption of advanced aligner technologies across North America and other regions.
Identified as a key market player positioned to benefit from the rapidly expanding clear aligners market, particularly through digital dentistry solutions and advanced orthodontic technologies.
Listed as a key player but faces headwinds from regulatory scrutiny over direct-to-consumer models and concerns around patient compliance mentioned as emerging market challenges.

title: Growth of the Invisible Orthodontics Market From USD 7.7 Billion in 2024 to USD 96.27 Billion by 2034, Driven by a CAGR of 28.54%
author: Na
description: The global invisible orthodontics market is projected to grow from USD 9.91 billion in 2025 to USD 96.27 billion by 2034, expanding at a CAGR of 28.54%. Clear aligners dominate the product segment, with North America leading regionally and Asia-Pacific showing significant growth potential. Adults currently represent the largest age segment, while the teens segment is expected to grow rapidly. Key drivers include rising dental misalignment cases, technological advancements in 3D printing, and increased consumer awareness of aesthetic dental solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is a key player in the clear aligners segment (Invisalign brand) which dominates the market. The market is projected to grow at 28.54% CAGR through 2034, and recent developments show Align Technology launching consumer and professional brand campaigns for kids and teens, indicating strong market positioning and expansion efforts.

Identified as a key player in the invisible orthodontics market. The company benefits from technological advancements in digital scanning and 3D imaging mentioned as growth drivers, and the overall market expansion at 28.54% CAGR presents significant growth opportunities.

Specifically mentioned for its Clarity Advanced/Ultra self-ligating ceramic brackets with advanced aesthetics and durability. The ceramic braces segment is expected to witness significant expansion during 2025-2034, positioning 3M favorably in this growing subsegment.

Listed as a key market player in the invisible orthodontics sector. As a major dental distributor and supplier, the company benefits from the overall market growth of 28.54% CAGR and increased adoption of invisible orthodontic solutions.

Listed as a key market player in the rapidly growing invisible orthodontics sector. The market shows strong growth trajectory with clear aligners segment leading, and general dentists segment expected to grow significantly, which aligns with SmileDirectClub's direct-to-consumer model.

title: Sleeping Bruxism Treatment Market Size to Reach USD 1,132.09 Million by 2033, Driven by Rising Awareness of Sleep Disorders and Oral Health Complications – SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global sleeping bruxism treatment market is projected to grow from USD 652.14 million in 2025 to USD 1,132.09 million by 2033, expanding at a 7.18% CAGR. Growth is driven by rising awareness of sleep disorders, increasing stress levels, and demand for oral appliances and behavioral therapies. Occlusal splints and night guards dominate the market, while biofeedback therapy devices represent the fastest-growing segment. North America leads with 40% market share, while Asia Pacific is expected to grow fastest at 9.25% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Introduced Schein Sleep Solutions in 2025, a comprehensive practice support program for screening and treating sleep-related disorders, positioning the company to capture market share in the expanding bruxism treatment market.
Listed as a major player in the market but no specific recent developments or innovations mentioned in the article.
Mentioned as a major player in the bruxism treatment market but no specific products, developments, or market activities detailed in the article.
